---
id: build-certificate-list
title: "Get a list of the build certificates"
description: "List all the build certificates that have been uploaded to a specific app. Read more in our [Listing the uploaded iOS code signing files of an app](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#listing-the-uploaded-ios-code-signing-files-of-an-app) guide."
sidebar_label: "Get a list of the build certificates"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a list of the build certificates"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/build-certificates"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the build certificates that have been uploaded to a specific app. Read more in our [Listing the uploaded iOS code signing files of an app](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#listing-the-uploaded-ios-code-signing-files-of-an-app) guide.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./build-certificate-list.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./build-certificate-list.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./build-certificate-list.StatusCodes.json")}
>
